name: Home
title: Home
metaDescription: Welcome to Elliot Dickerson's experimental Vue.js website featuring projects, games, and more.
metaKeywords: Vue.js, web development, software engineer, projects, games
body: Welcome to my personal portfolio and experimental sandbox. This platform serves as a space to explore emerging web technologies, prototype new features, and showcase technical projects.

Currently, I am a Software Engineer at RM, where I leverage my expertise to drive team success and deliver high-quality software solutions. I am passionate about continuous learning and professional development.

name: About
title: About Me
metaDescription: Learn about Elliot Dickerson - BSc (Hons) graduate with 14 years of PHP and JavaScript development experience.
metaKeywords: software engineer, PHP, Laravel, Symfony, VueJS, React, experience
body: I hold a BSc (Hons) degree and possess a comprehensive background in professional software engineering, spanning the majority of my career.

With over a decade of dedicated experience in software and web development, I specialize in PHP and JavaScript ecosystems. My technical proficiency extends to robust database management with MySQL and utilizing Git for advanced version control.

Throughout my career, I have successfully delivered projects leveraging a diverse range of modern frameworks and libraries, including:
  • Laravel and Symfony for backend PHP architecture
  • React, SolidJS, and VueJS for crafting scalable, dynamic user interfaces
Currently serving as a Software Engineer at RM, I am committed to tackling complex technical challenges and contributing to innovative, impactful projects.

name: Interests
title: My Interests
metaDescription: Discover Elliot's interests in coding, music, and creative projects including original guitar compositions.
metaKeywords: coding, music, guitar, YouTube, hobbies, creative projects
body: Beyond my professional endeavors, I am deeply invested in personal development and technical exploration. I actively develop side projects to experiment with innovative concepts and stay at the forefront of emerging technologies.
Music is a significant creative outlet for me. I am a multi-instrumentalist with a primary focus on the guitar. I compose original pieces and regularly share my work on my YouTube channel.

Currently, I am expanding my technical repertoire by exploring Three.js for rendering complex 3D graphics and designing immersive web experiences. The interactive 3D environment featured on this site is a testament to these ongoing experiments.

name: Hidden
title: Hidden
metaDescription: Secret page with links to fun projects and games built with Vue.js.
body: Welcome to the hidden page! This area isn't linked in the main navigation, but it's here for those curious enough to find it.
Here are some fun projects and games I've built:

• Alcohol Checker - Calculate when you'll be sober enough to drive
  • Noughts and Crosses - Classic tic-tac-toe against a bot
  • Ask Me - Chat with an automated assistant about my background
